name: Pulsedive
description: Pulsedive is a free community threat intelligence platform that provides indicator enrichment, threat analysis, and IOC feeds. It aggregates data from multiple OSINT feeds and enriches indicators with risk scoring, WHOIS, DNS, SSL, and HTTP data.

actions.name: Get Indicator by Value
actions.description: Retrieve enrichment data for a specific indicator (IP, domain, or URL) including risk score, threats, feeds, WHOIS, DNS, SSL, HTTP data, and related indicators.

parameters.name: indicator
parameters.description: The indicator value to look up (IP, domain, or URL)

parameters.name: pretty
parameters.description: Set to 1 for pretty-printed JSON output

actions.name: Get Indicator by ID
actions.description: Retrieve enrichment data for an indicator using its Pulsedive numeric ID.

actions.name: Get Indicator Properties
actions.description: Retrieve detailed properties for an indicator including DNS records, WHOIS data, SSL certificates, HTTP response data, and geo information.

parameters.name: get
parameters.description: Set to 'properties' to retrieve indicator properties

actions.name: Get Threat by ID
actions.description: Retrieve threat information including name, category, risk level, description, and associated indicators.

actions.name: Get Threat by Name
actions.description: Look up a threat by its name to get category, risk level, description, MITRE ATT&CK mappings, and associated indicators.

parameters.name: threat
parameters.description: The threat name to look up (e.g., 'Zeus', 'Emotet')

actions.name: Explore Indicators
actions.description: Search and explore indicators in the Pulsedive database using the Explore query language with boolean logic across risk, type, feed, threat, and attribute fields.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 100)

actions.name: Scan Indicator
actions.description: Submit an IP, domain, or URL for on-demand passive or active scanning to retrieve fresh enrichment data.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The indicator value to scan (IP, domain, or URL)

parameters.name: probe
parameters.description: Set to 1 for active scan, 0 for passive only (default: 0)
